items.title: Saved views and bulk actions
items.description: Save any filtered table as a named view and share it with your team. Select multiple rows to archive, tag, or export in one step.

items.title: Faster dashboard loads
items.description: Dashboards with 50+ widgets now render up to 3x faster thanks to incremental data fetching and cached aggregates.

items.title: CSV export encoding fix
items.description: Resolved an issue where exported CSV files dropped UTF-8 characters in non-Latin locales. Re-exports now preserve every character.

items.title: New webhooks API
items.description: Subscribe to record events over HTTPS. The legacy polling endpoint /v1/events is deprecated and will be removed on 1 August 2026.
